text.title: Ruby on Rails Framework Fundamentals Examples
text.summary: Worked example: harden Orders module from ad-hoc routes + ENV secrets + callback emails to conventions.

example.context: Rails 7 app; OrdersController has 8 ad-hoc routes; after_create :send_confirmation_email on Order; Stripe key in ENV.
example.walk: Step 1: audit → 8 ad-hoc routes, 1 callback-side-effect, 1 ENV secret. Step 2: routes.rb → resources :orders do member { patch :cancel, post :refund } end. Step 3: order_params = params.require(:order).permit(:customer_id, :note, items_attributes: [:sku, :qty]). Step 4: move OrderMailer#confirmation call from Order callback to OrderService#confirm. Step 5: rails credentials:edit adds stripe.secret; deploy removes ENV var.
example.output: 8 routes → 1 resources block + 2 member routes; emails only sent when service explicitly calls; secrets encrypted in source.
